name: 05 HR Agent v2 - Auditable Agentic Screening

parameters.formDescription: Submit your application. AI screening powered by OpenAI + Mistral OCR. Auditable v2 response within 5 business days.

parameters.name: score_guardrail
parameters.description: Checks HR rubric score bounds, recalculates total_score, and confirms the expected decision threshold. Input must be a JSON string with scores and decision. This tool has no side effects and does not write to Sheets or send email.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "qualificationRate": 0.82,
  "explanation": "2-3 sentence justification grounded only in CV evidence.",
  "scores": {
    "skills": 25,
    "industry": 18,
    "experience": 13,
    "education": 10,
    "projects": 12,
    "portfolio": 4
  },
  "total_score": 82,
  "decision": "Shortlist",
  "key_strengths": [
    "Strong Python and REST API experience",
    "Shipped n8n automation projects"
  ],
  "key_gaps": [
    "No clear vector database experience"
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "skills": "CV states Python, REST APIs, n8n, and LLM integration in project descriptions.",
    "industry": "Candidate worked in SaaS automation roles for more than 2 years.",
    "experience": "CV shows 5 years of relevant engineering experience.",
    "education": "Computer Science degree listed.",
    "projects": "CV lists shipped workflow automation and RAG projects.",
    "portfolio": "GitHub link is present but project depth is unclear."
  }
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a strict AI hiring assistant for DMsgBox, powered by OpenAI.

ICP - AI Automation Engineer:
- Industry: AI, Automation, SaaS, Tech
- Experience: 3-8 years
- Core Skills: Python, REST APIs, n8n/Zapier/Make, prompt engineering, LLM integration
- Education: CS, Data Science, Software Engineering
- Preferred: DevOps, AI Agents, Vector DBs, LangChain/RAG

SCORING (max 100, be strict; no full marks without clear evidence):
- skills /30 - Python + APIs + automation tool + LLM/prompt work
- industry /20 - 2+ years at AI/automation/SaaS/Tech
- experience /15 - within 3-8 yrs, increasing scope
- education /10 - CS/Data Sci/SWE degree
- projects /15 - concrete shipped AI/automation/RAG projects
- portfolio /10 - public GitHub or portfolio link with real artifacts

THRESHOLDS:
- total >= 75 -> Shortlist
- total 50-74 -> Moderate
- total < 50 -> Reject

RULES:
- Never invent skills or experience not present in the CV text.
- If CV text is empty or unreadable, score all dimensions 0 and decision='Reject'.
- Include short evidence notes for each scoring dimension.
- Use score_guardrail before final output.
- Your only job is evaluation. External actions are enforced by deterministic n8n nodes after you finish.

parameters.subject: =Shortlisted: {{ $('Validate AI Evaluation').item.json.candidate_name }} - Score {{ $('Validate AI Evaluation').item.json.total_score }}/100
